input.content:
name: Semantic Version Bumper

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      fixture:
        description: Commits fixture filename under fixtures/
        required: false
        default: feat-commits.txt
      start_version:
        description: Starting version to bump from
        required: false
        default: 1.1.0

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  FIXTURE: ${{ github.event.inputs.fixture || 'feat-commits.txt' }}
  START_VERSION: ${{ github.event.inputs.start_version || '1.1.0' }}

jobs:
  bump:
    name: Run semantic version bump
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install Bun
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash
          echo "$HOME/.bun/bin" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      - name: Show Bun version
        shell: bash
        run: bun --version

      - name: Run unit tests
        shell: bash
        run: bun test

      - name: Prepare scratch package.json
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p scratch
          printf '{"name":"demo","version":"%s"}\n' "$START_VERSION" > scratch/package.json

      - name: Bump version using fixture
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          bun run src/cli.ts \
            --version-file scratch/package.json \
            --commits-file "fixtures/${FIXTURE}" \
            --changelog-file scratch/CHANGELOG.md \
            --date 2026-04-17 | tee bump-output.txt

      - name: Show results
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "=== RESULT package.json ==="
          cat scratch/package.json
          echo
          echo "=== RESULT CHANGELOG.md ==="
          cat scratch/CHANGELOG.md

- name: Prepare scratch package.json
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          SV="${INPUT_START_VERSION:-${START_VERSION:-1.1.0}}"
          mkdir -p scratch
          printf '{"name":"demo","version":"%s"}\n' "$SV" > scratch/package.json
          echo "Using start version: $SV"

      - name: Bump version using fixture
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          FIX="${INPUT_FIXTURE:-${FIXTURE:-feat-commits.txt}}"
          echo "Using fixture: $FIX"
          bun run src/cli.ts \
            --version-file scratch/package.json \
            --commits-file "fixtures/${FIX}" \
            --changelog-file scratch/CHANGELOG.md \

name: Semantic Version Bumper

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      fixture:
        description: Commits fixture filename under fixtures/
        required: false
        default: feat-commits.txt
      start_version:
        description: Starting version to bump from
        required: false
        default: 1.1.0

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  bump:
    name: Run semantic version bump
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      # Allow the harness (act) or workflow_dispatch inputs to override these.
      # `act --env FIXTURE=...` sets the process env, and the shell expansion
      # below uses it as a default, falling back to feat-commits.txt.
      INPUT_FIXTURE: ${{ github.event.inputs.fixture }}
      INPUT_START_VERSION: ${{ github.event.inputs.start_version }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install Bun
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash
          echo "$HOME/.bun/bin" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      - name: Show Bun version
        shell: bash
        run: bun --version

      - name: Run unit tests
        shell: bash
        run: bun test

      - name: Prepare scratch package.json
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p scratch
          printf '{"name":"demo","version":"%s"}\n' "$START_VERSION" > scratch/package.json

      - name: Bump version using fixture
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          bun run src/cli.ts \
            --version-file scratch/package.json \
            --commits-file "fixtures/${FIXTURE}" \

          set -euo pipefail
          echo "=== RESULT package.json ==="

content.text: The workflow's `bun test` ran the act harness recursively. Fix:

input.old_string:
- name: Run unit tests
        shell: bash
        run: bun test
input.new_string:
- name: Run unit tests
        shell: bash
        # Exclude act.test.ts here — that is the outer harness that drives `act`
        # itself, and would recurse infinitely inside the workflow.
        run: bun test src/bumper.test.ts src/cli.test.ts

(file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

- name: Run unit tests
        shell: bash
        run: bun test
tool_use_result.newString:
- name: Run unit tests
        shell: bash

tool_use_result.originalFile:
name: Semantic Version Bumper

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      fixture:
        description: Commits fixture filename under fixtures/
        required: false
        default: feat-commits.txt
      start_version:
        description: Starting version to bump from
        required: false
        default: 1.1.0

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  bump:
    name: Run semantic version bump
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      # Allow the harness (act) or workflow_dispatch inputs to override these.
      # `act --env FIXTURE=...` sets the process env, and the shell expansion
      # below uses it as a default, falling back to feat-commits.txt.
      INPUT_FIXTURE: ${{ github.event.inputs.fixture }}
      INPUT_START_VERSION: ${{ github.event.inputs.start_version }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install Bun
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash
          echo "$HOME/.bun/bin" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      - name: Show Bun version
        shell: bash
        run: bun --version

      - name: Run unit tests
        shell: bash
        run: bun test

      - name: Prepare scratch package.json
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          SV="${INPUT_START_VERSION:-${START_VERSION:-1.1.0}}"
          mkdir -p scratch
          printf '{"name":"demo","version":"%s"}\n' "$SV" > scratch/package.json
          echo "Using start version: $SV"

      - name: Bump version using fixture
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          FIX="${INPUT_FIXTURE:-${FIXTURE:-feat-commits.txt}}"
          echo "Using fixture: $FIX"
          bun run src/cli.ts \
            --version-file scratch/package.json \
            --commits-file "fixtures/${FIX}" \
            --changelog-file scratch/CHANGELOG.md \
            --date 2026-04-17 | tee bump-output.txt

      - name: Show results
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "=== RESULT package.json ==="
          cat scratch/package.json
          echo
          echo "=== RESULT CHANGELOG.md ==="
          cat scratch/CHANGELOG.md

lines: +        # Exclude act.test.ts here — that is the outer harness that drives `act`
+        # itself, and would recurse infinitely inside the workflow.

Done. Summary:

- TDD-built bumper: `src/bumper.ts` (pure: `parseVersion`, `classifyCommit`, `determineBump`, `bumpVersion`, `generateChangelog`) and `src/cli.ts` (reads package.json, commits fixture, writes updated version + CHANGELOG.md).
- Fixtures: `fixtures/{feat,fix,breaking}-commits.txt`.
- Tests: `src/bumper.test.ts` (15 unit), `src/cli.test.ts` (4 integration), `src/act.test.ts` (3 workflow-structure + 3 act e2e).
- Workflow: `.github/workflows/semantic-version-bumper.yml` — push/pull_request/workflow_dispatch, installs Bun, runs unit tests, bumps using fixture, cats results. Passes `actionlint`.
- `act-result.txt` written with per-case delimiters; all 3 act runs exited 0 with "Job succeeded" and exact expected versions (1.2.0, 2.0.6, 2.0.0).
- Final: **25 pass / 0 fail**.

Done. Summary:

- TDD-built bumper: `src/bumper.ts` (pure: `parseVersion`, `classifyCommit`, `determineBump`, `bumpVersion`, `generateChangelog`) and `src/cli.ts` (reads package.json, commits fixture, writes updated version + CHANGELOG.md).
- Fixtures: `fixtures/{feat,fix,breaking}-commits.txt`.
- Tests: `src/bumper.test.ts` (15 unit), `src/cli.test.ts` (4 integration), `src/act.test.ts` (3 workflow-structure + 3 act e2e).
- Workflow: `.github/workflows/semantic-version-bumper.yml` — push/pull_request/workflow_dispatch, installs Bun, runs unit tests, bumps using fixture, cats results. Passes `actionlint`.
- `act-result.txt` written with per-case delimiters; all 3 act runs exited 0 with "Job succeeded" and exact expected versions (1.2.0, 2.0.6, 2.0.0).
- Final: **25 pass / 0 fail**.
